events.name: 1st Event of the Nursing Leadership Program (NLP)
events.tagline: Developing Leaders. Strengthening Teams. Transforming Nursing.

content.title: NURSING LEADERSHIP PROGRAM (NLP)
content.subtitle: Middle-Level Incharges — Batch 1, 2026
content.tagline: Developing Leaders. Strengthening Teams. Transforming Nursing.

content.title: About the Nursing Leadership Program
content.subtitle: Vision & Strategy
content.lead: The Nursing Leadership Program (NLP) is a premier executive capacity building initiative designed specifically for healthcare administrative pillars: the Middle-Level Incharges.
content.body: Our program aligns clinical unit management with empathetic patient advocacy. By reinforcing core leadership traits, communication pathways, and stress tolerance, NLP equips leaders to guide clinical units into the future of healthcare excellence.

items.title: 1st Event Objective
items.description: Establishing the core values of NLP, configuring functional nurse teams, and initializing professional growth targets for Batch 1, 2026.

items.title: Date & Schedule
items.description: 10-11 July & 26 July 2026. Schedule is spread across In-House Workshops (Days 1 & 2) and Outside Leadership Training (Day 3).

items.title: Venue & Lodging
items.description: Held at the 10th Floor ITC Department (In-House) & Outbound Facility. Equipped for professional workshops and interactive team exercises.

items.title: Target Participants
items.description: All newly appointed and senior Middle-Level Incharges across regional campuses registered under Batch 1.

items.title: Welcome and Warm up
items.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh, Dr. Pallavi & Ms. Jaiprabha
items.details: Welcome check-in, event orientation, and interactive team warm-up activity.

items.title: Communication
items.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
items.details: Scripting - A tool for communication, Dept. vision/mission, Conflict Management, Assertive communication, delivering complex messages simply, and listening with active intent.

items.title: Developing the Individuals
items.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
items.details: How to groom a Nurse to the next level, motivation, coaching styles based on needs, performance feedback, leveraging team strengths, customer feedback presentation, and punctuality.

items.title: Wrap up & Assignment Discussion
items.speaker: Ms. Jaiprabha Agarwal
items.details: Concluding discussions, Q&A, day-end assignments, and agenda walkthrough for the next day.

items.title: Recap of the Previous Day
items.speaker: Ms. Jaiprabha
items.details: Learning recaps, feedback reviews, and cohort reflections from Day 1.

items.title: Managing Unit Performance
items.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
items.details: Time management, joint ownership & accountability, developing cross-departmental goals daily/monthly/yearly, grooming, managing organizational change, and service excellence.

items.title: Foundational Leadership
items.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
items.details: How leaders grow, Leadership Competency Model, leadership styles (Transformational Leadership), qualities, distinction between leadership and management, and self-assessment.

items.title: Leadership Skills, Branding & Marketing
items.speaker: Ms. Jaiprabha
items.details: Branding and marketing strategies, quality performance metrics in nursing leadership.

items.title: Group Making & Assignment Discussion
items.speaker: Ms. Jaiprabha Agarwal
items.details: Formulating training groups, allocating case studies, and assigning roles for the outbound projects.

items.title: Outside Leadership Training: Outbound Team Exercise
items.speaker: External Mentors & CNO Team
items.details: Outbound experiential learning exercises, teamwork challenges, and collaborative problem-solving.

items.title: Program Evaluation & Closing Ceremony
items.speaker: Nursing Director & HR Head
items.details: Review of cohort achievements, closing remarks, and presentation of certificate awards.

items.title: Interactive Team Simulations
items.description: Cohort exercises designed to build trust, delegation skills, and emergency alignment.

items.title: Synergistic Unit Projects
items.description: Joint cross-departmental problem-solving projects to optimize ward scheduling templates.

content.instructions: Verify details, select your session slot, and submit check-in register log.
content.successMsg: Attendance recorded successfully. Thank you for participating in the Nursing Leadership Program.
content.duplicateMsg: You have already recorded check-in for this session today.

fields.label: Designation
fields.options: Nursing Superintendent, Assistant Nursing Superintendent, Ward Incharge, Clinical Instructor, Staff Nurse

items.title: Welcome to the 1st NLP Conference
items.message: Welcome all Middle-Level Incharges! Please complete your registration at the front desk and verify your badge detail.

content.categories: Opening Ceremony, Leadership Sessions, Group Activities, Guest Speakers, Team Exercises, Key Moments

items.title: Lighting of the Lamp
items.description: The traditional inauguration of Batch 1 of the Nursing Leadership Program.

items.title: Dr. Evelyn Carter Keynote
items.description: Opening address detailing the executive mindset required in healthcare management.

items.title: Synergistic Unit Exercise
items.description: Participants collaborating on clinical resource management simulations.

items.title: Problem-Solving Workshops
items.description: Interactive problem-solving session focusing on ward scheduling optimization.

items.title: Event Information Booklet
items.description: Comprehensive program outline, batch schedules, speaker profiles, and venue directories.

items.title: Program Agenda (At a Glance)
items.description: Quick Reference timeline sheet containing session slots and hall venues.

items.title: Effective Communication Slides
items.description: Lecture slides presented by Prof. Marcus Vance on communication frameworks in stressful units.

items.title: Staff Scheduling Activity Sheet
items.description: Worksheet printout containing scenarios for the scheduling optimization workshop.

items.comments: The sessions on assertive communication and transformational leadership styles were highly practical and directly applicable to ICU ward coordination.
Well structured agenda. The inbound activities on Day 3 really helped our regional team break barriers and align objectives.

people.shortProfile: Dr. Evelyn Carter has over 25 years of experience in healthcare administration and nursing leadership. She has pioneered several national nurse-mentorship programs and holds a doctorate in Nursing Practice from Johns Hopkins University.
Professor Vance specializes in healthcare team dynamics, organizational behavior, and crisis communication. He conducts leadership seminars globally for critical care networks.
Sister Clara is a veteran nursing administrator recognized for her work in reducing hospital-acquired infection rates. She advises governmental boards on nursing policy.
people.sessionTitle: Guest Session by Sister Clara Thomas

people.shortProfile: Robert manages clinical logistics and coordinates the scheduling for all batches of the Nursing Leadership Program.
Oversees overall planning, curricula design, and execution of the Nursing Leadership Program events across all batches.
Manages venue preparation, audio-visual technical setups, food and beverage coordination, and attendee flow.
Coordinates with middle-level incharges across multiple centers, handles registration inquiries, and processes session attendance logs.

schedule.title: Communication
schedule.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
schedule.details: • Scripting – A tool for communication • Dept. vision mission/Conflict Management • Assertive communication • Deliver complex messages in a simple-to-understand way • Listen with suspended judgment & active intent

schedule.title: Developing the Individuals
schedule.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
schedule.details: • How to groom a Nurse to the next level • What motivates individual members of the team • Coaching style based on needs of each individual • Performance feedback • Leverage strengths of individual team members • Back to basics (Customer Feedback Presentation) • Punctuality

schedule.title: Discussion on Assignment & Agenda for next day
schedule.speaker: Team

schedule.title: Managing Unit performance
schedule.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
schedule.details: • Time management • Take joint ownership & accountability • Develop and pursue goals that cross departmental lines daily, Monthly & Yearly basis • Grooming • Managing change in the organization • Service excellence and communication

schedule.title: Foundational Leadership
schedule.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi
schedule.details: • How leaders grow • Leadership Competency Model, Leadership styles • Transformational Leadership • Leadership qualities • Distinction between Leadership and Management • Self Assessment

schedule.title: How to prepare power point slide
schedule.speaker: Ms. Precila Fernandes
schedule.details: Planning the Presentation • Designing Effective Slides • Using Visuals & Charts • Presentation Tips • Common Mistakes to Avoid • Conclusion

schedule.title: Discussion on Assignment
schedule.speaker: Team
schedule.details: How to Make an Assignment: • Choose and understand the topic. • Collect information from reliable sources. • Organize the content with an introduction, main body, and conclusion. • Use clear language, proper formatting, and cite references if required.

schedule.title: Message to the Group & Clinical Governance
schedule.speaker: Vice President – Operations

schedule.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi Singh
schedule.details: • Programme Expectations • Curriculum Overview • Learning Objectives

schedule.speaker: External Speaker
schedule.details: • Middle Management Skills • Managing Upward and Downward • Bridging Leadership and Teams • Effective Leadership for Middle Managers • Aligning Top Management Vision with Team Execution • Achieving Middle Management Excellence • Managing Leadership Expectations and Team Performance

schedule.title: Team Building Activity
schedule.speaker: Mr. Rohit Singh & Dr. Pallavi Singh
schedule.details: • Building an Effective Team • Role of the Nurse Manager • Staffing in Nursing Units • Managing Team Members' Performance • Interviewing Skills

schedule.title: SWOT Analysis
schedule.speaker: Training Team
schedule.details: • Interactive Warm-up Activity • Individual & Team SWOT Exercise

schedule.title: Nursing Leadership Skills
schedule.speaker: Ms. Precila Fernandes
schedule.details: • Personal Branding for Nurse Leaders • Leadership Marketing & Professional Image • Quality Improvement & Performance Excellence • Practical Implementation of Leadership Skills

schedule.speaker: Ms. Precila Fernandes
schedule.details: • Open Discussion • Key Takeaways • Action Plan • Closing Remarks & Vote of Thanks
